EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriSpatialReferenceError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Describes why a parameter to a method is incorrect, or why a method could not be completed.

[Guid("161F4400-645E-11D2-BCDD-0000F875BCCE")]
public enum esriSpatialReferenceError

Fields

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_BADVCSID = 32725

32725: (0x80047FD5) The specified WKID for a vertical coordinate system is not valid.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_CANTDEFINEAUTH = 32724

32724: (0x80047FD4) Can't assign authority metadata to this spatial reference object because it is empty.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_CANTDEFINESR = 32716

32716: (0x80047FCC) Not enough information has been supplied to construct this spatial reference.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_CANTLOADXFORMFILE = 32728

32728: (0x80047FD8) The data file for this datum transformation cannot be loaded.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_EMPTYUNIT = 32723

32723: (0x80047FD3) A WKID or a WKT must be specified for a Unit.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_INSUFFICIENTPRECISION = 32718

32718: (0x80047FCE) A low precision spatial reference cannot cover the specified extent at the input precision (ConstructLowPrecisionSpatialreference)).

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_INVALID_JSON_SR = 32729

32729: (0x80047FD9) Invalid JSON SR

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_INVALID_PARAMETER = 32715

32715: (0x80047FCB) This parameter is not appropriate for this projection.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOMPRECISION = 32726

32726: (0x80047FD6) The m precision information for this spatial reference system has not been defined.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOPRECISION = 32714

32714: (0x80047FCA) The xy precision information for this spatial reference system has not been defined.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOTAGCS = 32720

32720: (0x80047FD0) The specified WKID (factory code) or WKT (definition string) is not a Geographic Coordinate System.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOTAPCS = 32721

32721: (0x80047FD1) The specified WKID (factory code) or WKT (definition string) is not a Projected Coordinate System.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOTAPRJFILE = 32719

32719: (0x80047FCF) The input to CreateESRISpatialReference(Info)FromPRJ(File) is not a workstation PRJ file.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOTAUNIT = 32722

32722: (0x80047FD2) The specified WKID (factory code) or WKT (definition string) is not a linear or angular unit.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_NOZPRECISION = 32727

32727: (0x80047FD7) The z precision information for this spatial reference system has not been defined.

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_PRECISIONTOOHIGH = 32717

32717: (0x80047FCD) The domain extent with the specified precision doesn't contain the domain extent of the source spatial reference (ConstructHighPrecisionSpatialReference).

E_SPATIALREFERENCE_WRONG_UNIT_TYPE = 32730

32730: (0x80047FDA) Wrong unit type (expected linear unit, got angular unit, or vice versa)

Made with docfx
